sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f derived from arithmetic mean HPR (A) and standard deviation (SD) using relationship SD=1.25*M. Specific optimal_f value not provided in excerpt; must be calculated from system results using fundamental equation: TWR=(A²-SD²)^(N/2). Implementation requires historical trade data.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be based on the fundamental equation relating arithmetic average HPR (A), standard deviation (SD), and number of trades (N) to determine optimal trading wealth accumulation (TWR).
